heading: Expedited review of certain appeals
label: 3904 Expedited review of certain appeals
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1997section 3(d) of Pub. L. 104–331section 1296 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: An appeal may be taken directly to the Supreme Court of the United States from any interlocutory or final judgment, decree, or order of a court upon the constitutionality of any provision of chapter 5 of title 3.

children.heading: .—Jurisdiction
children.label: b .—Jurisdiction
children.text: The Supreme Court shall, if it has not previously ruled on the question, accept jurisdiction over the appeal referred to in subsection (a), advance the appeal on the docket, and expedite the appeal to the greatest extent possible.
